name: Mitosis
description: Open-source component compiler by Builder.io that lets you write UI components once and compile them to React, Vue, Svelte, Angular, Solid, Qwik, and more. Enables framework-agnostic design systems.

seo.title: Mitosis — Design Tools / Design-to-Code
seo.meta_description: Mitosis: Open-source component compiler by Builder.io that lets you write UI components once and compile them to React, Vue, Svelte, Angular, Solid, Qwik, and m

when_to_use: Design system components compiled once to React and Vue
Framework-agnostic component library published to npm
Qwik and Solid targets added to existing React component set
Angular migration de-risked by writing new components in Mitosis
White-label UI kit shipped to clients using different frameworks

pros: Write once, compile to React, Vue, Svelte, Angular, Solid, Qwik
Genuinely useful for framework-agnostic design systems
cons: Compiler output quality varies per target framework
Small community versus native framework ecosystems
review.verdict: Real value for library authors shipping components to many frameworks; overkill for single-framework apps.
review.best_for: Design system teams distributing components across React, Vue, Svelte, and more.
review.not_for: Single-framework product teams — write native components instead.
